title: cyathea obnoxia
intro: Cyathea obnoxia, also known as the Rough Tree Fern, is a species of tree fern native to the tropical regions of Australia and New Guinea. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties that can help to soothe wounds and infections. The Rough Tree Fern has been reported to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and aiding in the treatment of skin conditions. In herbal preparations, the leaves and roots of the Cyathea obnoxia can be used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
